description.en: Returns the access mode passed toLockManager.request()when the lock was requested. The mode is either"exclusive"(the default) or"shared".

excerpt.es: Returns the access mode passed toLockManager.request()when the lock was requested. The mode is either"exclusive"(the default) or"shared".
